steps.t: Rhovendol mentioned that Barían could often be found in the Mason's Quarter in Dol Amroth. You should see if you can catch a glimpse of Barían before …
The great fountain of Dol Amroth is in the Court of the Fount. You should <rgb=#FF0000>meditate</rgb> at the fountain, and think of how it…
Blue canopies can be found in the Court of the Fount. You should examine the canopies for resemblance to Barían.
The building whose stone detail caught your eye is south-east of the fountain in the Court of the Fount -- the one with the golden statue atop it. You…
Rhovendol is in the Scholar's Quarter in Dol Amroth. You should return to Rhovendol.
